acceptedAnswer.text: Delay report, talk insurance, no photos.
acceptedAnswer.description: Talking to adjuster alone, delaying medical, signing quick releases, not documenting.[5] Context: Cost thousands. Key factors: Evidence loss. Practical guidance: Lawyer prevents; free help. Learn from others.
